description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: On the bundles page, add to your cart the starter-style anti-aging bundle under $120 that offers at least a 2‑month supply and the highest percentage discount among those options.
tasks.name: On the bundles page, add to your cart the starter-style anti-aging bundle under $120 that offers at least a 2‑month supply and the highest percentage discount among those options.
tasks.description: On the bundles page, add to your cart the starter-style anti-aging bundle under $120 that offers at least a 2‑month supply and the highest percentage discount among those options.

tasks.instruction: From the main anti-aging supplement product page, start a 3‑bottle subscription that ships every 30 days with a price per bottle under $45, then proceed to checkout and complete the contact and shipping fields using the specified test details.
tasks.name: From the main anti-aging supplement product page, start a 3‑bottle subscription that ships every 30 days with a price per bottle under $45, then proceed to checkout and complete the contact and shipping fields using the specified test details.
tasks.description: From the main anti-aging supplement product page, start a 3‑bottle subscription that ships every 30 days with a price per bottle under $45, then proceed to checkout and complete the contact and shipping fields using the specified test details.

tasks.instruction: Use the quiz for a 52‑year‑old whose main concerns are wrinkles and low energy, then from the results add a single non‑subscription recommendation priced under $100 to your cart as a one‑time purchase.
tasks.name: Use the quiz for a 52‑year‑old whose main concerns are wrinkles and low energy, then from the results add a single non‑subscription recommendation priced under $100 to your cart as a one‑time purchase.
tasks.description: Use the quiz for a 52‑year‑old whose main concerns are wrinkles and low energy, then from the results add a single non‑subscription recommendation priced under $100 to your cart as a one‑time purchase.

tasks.instruction: Add to your cart a single bottle of a supplement as a one‑time purchase that lists both resveratrol and collagen as ingredients, contains no caffeine, and costs under $70.
tasks.name: Add to your cart a single bottle of a supplement as a one‑time purchase that lists both resveratrol and collagen as ingredients, contains no caffeine, and costs under $70.
tasks.description: Add to your cart a single bottle of a supplement as a one‑time purchase that lists both resveratrol and collagen as ingredients, contains no caffeine, and costs under $70.

tasks.instruction: From the clinical studies section, open the product detail page for a supplement that was used in a study lasting at least 8 weeks with participants aged between 40 and 60.

target_names: 12-Week Double-Blind Study of Advanced Age-Defy Formula in Adults Aged 40–60

tasks.name: From the clinical studies section, open the product detail page for a supplement that was used in a study lasting at least 8 weeks with participants aged between 40 and 60.

tasks.instruction: On the main anti-aging supplement’s page, filter customer reviews to people in their 50s with a skin-related goal, sort by most recent, then follow the link from the second review to open its associated routine or product page.

target_names: Subtle but real changes in texture

tasks.name: On the main anti-aging supplement’s page, filter customer reviews to people in their 50s with a skin-related goal, sort by most recent, then follow the link from the second review to open its associated routine or product page.

tasks.instruction: Create a cart with two different anti-aging items, then at checkout select a shipping method that delivers in 3–5 business days for under $15 and continue to the payment step.

tasks.instruction: Use the site’s contact form to submit a product safety question about taking the main anti-aging supplement together with a Vitamin D supplement, filling all required fields with the provided test details.

expected_values.name: Jordan Example
expected_values.subject: Question about combining anti-aging supplement with Vitamin D
expected_values.message: Is it safe to take your main anti-aging supplement together with a daily 2000 IU Vitamin D supplement?

tasks.instruction: Using the newsletter sign-up form in the footer, subscribe with test details while selecting interests related to anti-aging tips and product launches and choosing a weekly email frequency if available.
